title: TRONJE 9" LED Candle Red with Timer and Remote Control - flameless 23cm Pillar Wax Candle with Moving Flame - Battery Operated - Burn Time 1000h
features: ATMOSPHERIC CANDLELIGHT with a gentle flickering flame: Tronje LED wax candles have an illuminated wick moved by electromagnetic control, making the candle flame look real
100% SAFE - No soot, smoke or stains! The outer covering of 100% PARAFFIN makes the candle just like a real pillar one. Very ROBUST & WIND-PROOF! Completely SAFE for children & animals!
TIMER & REMOTE CONTROL - Both included! Remote control with 10 m RANGE switches the real wax LED candle ON, OFF or puts the flameless candle on TIMER-MODE: 5 h running / 19 h standby

SUPER LONG BURNING TIME - When operated with 2 alkaline batteries Mono D 1.5V (optional), lighting times of up to 1000 HOURS are achieved. This means a runtime in the timer function of up to 200 DAYS!
WARM-WHITE LED LIGHT - flameless LED real wax candle with flickering light, 9 cm diameter, 23 cm tall. Without batteries, it weighs 470 g
description: Gentle LED mood light The tronje artificial LED pillar candle with imitation candlelight is an atmospheric wax candle with flickering flames. The light on this electronic candle looks exactly like natural candlelight and creates a homely atmosphere in any room. Safety first These tronje candles are battery-powered, 100% safe and you can position them anywhere without concern, e.g. under curtains, in glass cabinets and in children's rooms as a gentle nightlight. No flames, soot or wax stains! How it works Tronje LED candles have a moving magnetic wick lit up by an LED. The motion and warm-glowing LED light together create a perfect candlelight imitation. LED light with timer function and remote control The Tronje electric candles can be used continuously or in battery-saving mode. When the switch is set to TIMER or the timer mode is activated by remote control, the real wax LED candles shine for 5 hours before automatically going out; then automatically go back on 19 hours later. In timer mode, this cableless candle shines for up to 1000 hours (depending on battery quality). Smart LED candle: - Real wax candle (100% paraffin) - Beautifully imitates flickering candlelight - No open flames, soot or wax stains, also wind-proof - Safe with children, animals and people with disabilities - With timer function - 5h running / 19 h standby - Burn time: up to 1000 hours Included: 1x LED wax candle with timer function 1x remote control Please note: The decoration as shown is not included. There is always 1 candle per pack, even where several candles are depicted on the box.
